svg.title: myexpensio claim status lifecycle
svg.desc: State machine diagram showing the transitions between claim statuses: Draft, Submitted (locked), and terminal states

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is a new claim created in myexpensio?')
sendPrompt('What can I do with a Draft claim in myexpensio?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a claim is submitted in myexpensio?')
sendPrompt('What does admin review of a submitted claim look like?')
sendPrompt('How do I export a submitted claim in myexpensio?')

svg.text: SUBMITTED claims are immutable: enforced by UI, API, and database RLS.
No status reversal (Submitted → Draft) in Phase 1.
Export values always match submitted snapshot — no recalculation.
Tap any state to ask a question
